headline: Eastman Chemical (EMN) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Why Eastman Chemical Is Drawing Fresh Attention Eastman Chemical (EMN) is back on investors’ radar after a strong move over the past 3 months, contrasting with weaker 1 year and 5 year total returns that still sit in negative territory. See our latest analysis for Eastman Chemical. The recent 23.4% 3 month share price return and 8.6% 1 month share price return, off a last close of US$75.28, contrasts with a 1 year total shareholder return of a 16.6% decline. This suggests momentum has picked...
